transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to have you here. I hope you had no trouble finding the place and that you're feeling comfortable.

My name is Alex, and I'll be conducting your interview for the Software Engineer position. We're really excited to be meeting with candidates for this role, and I'm looking forward to learning more about you and your background.

Before we get into the technical stuff, I'd love to just start with a simple one. Could you tell me a little bit about yourself, your background, and what drew you to apply for this position?
Of course! So please, go ahead and tell me a bit about yourself. What's your background in software engineering, and what made you interested in applying for this role?
